_comment: Tier-2 for Kratos fluid#0: VELOCITY (and other variables) must be added to ModelPart variables list BEFORE any Node is created. Accessing the variable on a Node without prior AddNodalSolutionStepVariable raises RuntimeError 'variables list doesn't have this variable: VELOCITY' from variables_list_data_value_container. Same family as heat#0 (TEMPERATURE). Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
